allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('next:', p.dependencies.next, 'tailwind:', p.devDependencies.tailwindcss\)")

Bash(node -e " process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const o=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('top note hearts:', o.topNotes?.[0]?.heartCount, '| body snippet:', o.topNotes?.[0]?.body?.slice\(0,60\)\); console.log\('notes returned:', o.topNotes?.length\); console.log\('oldest note date:', o.topNotes?.map\(n=>n.date\).sort\(\)[0]\); }\);")
